items.question: What types of software projects does ITX Networks handle?
items.answer: We deliver web applications, mobile apps, desktop software, enterprise systems, APIs, cloud-native platforms, and modernisation programmes for businesses across India and international markets.

items.question: Which industries do you typically work with?
items.answer: Our work spans logistics, healthcare, manufacturing, retail, education, financial services, and professional services. We focus on understanding domain workflows before recommending technical solutions.

items.question: Do you work with startups as well as established enterprises?
items.answer: Yes. We support early-stage product builds, growth-stage scaling, and enterprise-grade programmes with compliance, integration, and long-term maintenance requirements.

items.question: Where is your team based?
items.answer: ITX Networks operates with a India-focused delivery model and supports remote collaboration with clients globally. Office location details will be published when available.

items.question: How do you start a new project?
items.answer: We begin with discovery workshops to understand goals, users, constraints, and success metrics. This leads to a scope outline, delivery plan, and technical approach before development begins.

items.question: Which development methodology do you follow?
items.answer: We typically use agile delivery with two-week sprints, regular demos, backlog refinement, and transparent reporting. Methodology is adapted to match your internal processes where needed.

items.question: Can you join an existing product team?
items.answer: Yes. We frequently augment in-house teams with engineers, QA specialists, designers, and architects while aligning with your existing tools, ceremonies, and coding standards.

items.question: How do you manage project communication?
items.answer: We assign a dedicated point of contact, share weekly status updates, maintain a visible backlog, and document decisions so stakeholders always know progress, risks, and next steps.

items.question: Which technologies do you use?
items.answer: Our stack includes React, Next.js, Node.js, .NET, Java, Python, React Native, Flutter, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, AWS, Azure, and GCP depending on project requirements.

items.question: Do you provide cloud architecture and DevOps support?
items.answer: Yes. We design cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, and security controls as part of delivery or as a standalone engagement for existing applications.

items.question: Can you integrate with third-party systems?
items.answer: Integration is a core capability. We connect CRMs, ERPs, payment gateways, identity providers, analytics tools, and custom APIs using secure, well-documented interfaces.

items.question: Do you offer automated testing?
items.answer: We provide manual and automated QA including unit, integration, end-to-end, and regression testing to improve release confidence and reduce production defects.

items.question: What engagement models do you offer?
items.answer: We offer fixed-scope projects, dedicated team extensions, and advisory consulting. The model is selected based on clarity of requirements, timeline, and internal capacity.

items.question: How is pricing structured?
items.answer: Pricing depends on scope, team composition, timeline, and support expectations. After discovery, we provide a transparent proposal with milestones and deliverables.

items.question: Do you sign NDAs and handle confidential data securely?
items.answer: Yes. We routinely work under NDAs and follow secure access practices, least-privilege permissions, and environment separation for sensitive client information.

items.question: What happens after the product goes live?
items.answer: We offer maintenance and support plans covering monitoring, bug fixes, enhancements, security updates, and SLA-backed response times tailored to your operational needs.

items.question: Do you provide post-launch support?
items.answer: Yes. Our maintenance services include incident response, performance tuning, feature enhancements, and proactive health checks for production systems.

items.question: Can you modernise legacy applications?
items.answer: We specialise in phased modernisation, including UI refreshes, API extraction, database migration, cloud rehosting, and full rebuilds when business risk allows.

items.question: Will we own the source code and intellectual property?
items.answer: For custom development engagements, clients typically receive ownership of deliverables as defined in the contract. Specific IP terms are agreed during the proposal stage.
